skill.summary: Discover supported cryptocurrencies, generate deposit addresses, and withdraw crypto to external wallets.

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release of the Crypto Wallet skill.

- Supports listing of supported cryptocurrencies and their blockchain networks.
- Allows generating deposit addresses for selected coins and networks.
- Enables withdrawing crypto to external wallets with fee quoting and status tracking.
- Includes flows and safety rules for depositing and withdrawing crypto.
- Requires authentication and transaction PIN for secure withdrawals.
